p2p_enrich.notes:
Added 6 new pass_to_pass tests and updated eval_manifest.yaml:

NEW P2P TESTS ADDED (test_outputs.py):
1. test_repo_go_mod_verify - validates go.mod and go.sum integrity
2. test_skeleton_css_template_exists - ensures skeleton css.html exists
3. test_skeleton_js_template_exists - ensures skeleton js.html exists
4. test_skeleton_main_css_exists - ensures skeleton main.css exists
5. test_skeleton_main_js_exists - ensures skeleton main.js exists
6. test_skeleton_layouts_exist - ensures baseof.html, home.html, page.html exist

EXISTING P2P TESTS PRESERVED:
- test_repo_gofmt - Go formatting check
- test_repo_go_vet - Go vet on ./create/...
- test_repo_build - Hugo binary compiles
- test_repo_unit_tests_create - Unit tests for create package

CI COMMANDS DISCOVERED FROM REPO:
- gofmt (via check_gofmt.sh) - WORKS
- go vet ./... - WORKS
- go build - WORKS
- go test ./create/... - WORKS
- go mod verify - WORKS (NEWLY ADDED)

- mage check - SKIPPED (requires dart-sass, ruby gems, pandoc - heavy deps)

- tests/test_outputs.py - Added TestThemeSkeletonIntegrity class + test_repo_go_mod_verify

validate.notes: Fixed solve.sh to apply gold patch correctly. The original patch failed due to context mismatch in main.css (missing blank line). Fixed by rewriting solve.sh to directly write files. Also added Hugo rebuild step since skeleton files are embedded at build time via //go:embed directive. All 27 tests pass.
